name: packcare
description: Real-time multi-caregiver pet-care app that prevents safety-critical double-dosing.

scripts.build: npm --prefix care-log run build && npm --prefix gateway run build && npm --prefix scheduler run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix care-log run typecheck && npm --prefix gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix scheduler run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix care-log install && npm --prefix gateway install && npm --prefix scheduler install && npm --prefix web install
